name: Everolimus Aging geroprotection registry
summary: Active-not-recruiting randomized triple-masked phase 2 trial evaluating whether 24 weeks of daily or weekly everolimus can safely improve physiological and molecular hallmarks of aging in older insulin-resistant or prediabetic adults.
population: Adults aged 55 to 80 years who are insulin resistant or prediabetic, plus a younger non-intervention comparator cohort

trial_details.expected_results_window: The registry listed estimated primary and study completion in September 2026 and had no posted results in the June 11, 2026 API view.
trial_details.why_it_matters: This is a direct everolimus aging trial with dose-schedule comparison, metabolic, cardiac, cognitive, molecular, and safety endpoints that could materially improve Rapalogs coverage once results appear.
